implementation_summary.summary: CP00-863 bridges the RP28 Marketplace descriptor-only permission decision review tail into the RP28.P07 failure-recovery foundation across RP28.P06.M09.S03-RP28.P07.M05.S04 without executing failure runtime paths, retries, rollback, compensation, permission decisions, audit writes, product-state writes, Hermes runtime receipts, or using real client data.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-863 RP28.P06.M09.S03-RP28.P07.M05.S04 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

review_adjudication.p3_disposition: CP863-P3-01 is closed by running and recording the full deterministic validation suite after review normalization, adjudication update, and queue regeneration, before commit.
